scope: Compact Spectra open-source harvest posture. Verify current licenses before copying code.

entries.name: Aider
entries.copyPolicy: Do not copy wholesale. Harvest repo-map, git-native diff, test-loop, and commit/undo patterns.
entries.implementationNotes: Potential sidecar later; not core dependency for MVP.

entries.name: Cline
entries.copyPolicy: Harvest Plan/Act UX, approval gating, visible tool calls, and diff review patterns; do not clone the app.
entries.implementationNotes: Key UX reference for Spectra coding cockpit.

entries.name: OpenHands
entries.license: MIT / verify current repo terms before reuse
entries.copyPolicy: Do not embed or copy platform architecture wholesale. Study sandbox and agent-canvas ideas only.

entries.name: ComfyUI
entries.copyPolicy: Do not import GPL code into Spectra core. Reference node/workflow UX only if useful.
entries.implementationNotes: Possible sidecar/reference later; avoid core dependency.
